title: Formulas
summary: 9701 AS — empirical, molecular, and ionic formulas.

simpleExplanation.title: Counting atoms in compounds
simpleExplanation.summary: Formulas show atom ratios. Empirical is simplest; molecular gives actual numbers; ionic balances charges.

sections.content: **Formulas** (2.3) is tested in **analysis and mole questions**. Know **combustion data method** for empirical.
